title: Node.js Backend Engineer
description: Taskr is a Y Combinator-backed productivity app competing with Notion and Asana. We're a team of 8 moving fast. You'll own the backend API that powers real-time collaboration for 80k teams. Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and WebSockets are our bread and butter.
responsibilities: Build real-time collaboration features with WebSockets
Optimise database queries for 80k concurrent teams
